question: State of the cathepsin B literature in glioblastoma invasion
provenance: 7 of 17 records are REAL Crossref-resolvable DOIs (the seed 2004 Oncogene paper retracted in 2025, plus 6 real high-impact papers). The remaining 10 are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic records (doi prefix 10.1038/gbm-*, marked illustrative:true) that demonstrate the detectors on a known method-drift / reagent-contamination pattern without claiming to be real publications. Keystone labels them as such in the UI; it never presents a synthetic DOI as a real one.
